ItacPersonItem.Notes: The name Lucia Spinola is given in Guazzo’s list of contributors, but the dialogue following her madrigal in Guazzo, 1595, 349, names the poet as Livia. This latter name appears in several other contemporary texts while Lucia is exclusive to the above. See Virginia Cox, The Prodigious Muse: Women’s Writing in Counter-Reformation Italy (Baltimore: The Johns Hopkins University Press, 2011), 268.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
